audit_items.proof_trace: aspeed_peci_clk_release calls clk_disable_unprepare(data) and returns immediately; clk_disable_unprepare never frees its struct clk * argument, so no pointer is freed within this function and no UAF or double-free is possible. The devm LIFO ordering guarantees the clock is still valid when the callback fires, and devm_add_action_or_reset ensures single invocation.
